name: VerifyIQ Orchestrator
description: Hub agent. Accepts verification requests, resolves agents via Registry, fans out to data agents, chains to Risk Synthesis, streams progress via SSE. Also acts as an A2A server for external orchestrators (e.g. Mortgage Platform).

skills.name: Subject Verification
skills.description: Accepts a verification request and returns a structured VerificationDecision by coordinating Equifax, Employment, International, and Risk Synthesis agents.
